Name: Average time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants containing both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 in the review process
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average waiting time to SW-Reviewer Agreed following the execution of Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total resolution time of Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 measured as the duration until the next occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants where both activities appear consecutively in the reviewer assignment phase
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Elapsed time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and SW-Reviewer No Response in cases where agreement is not reached
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response'

Name: Average time it takes for Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to be followed by any final reviewer outcome (SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, or SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and SW-Reviewer Declined in variants reflecting failed reviewer recruitment
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Time of Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 measured as the interval between its occurrence and the immediately preceding activity (e.g., Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 or SW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: the average of the duration between the first time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' or `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and the last time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'
